description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build C++ Nuget Package that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow takes optional inputs for ice_version and source_url, and an optional secret NUGET_API_KEY. In a windows-latest job, check out the repository, set up dependencies, build C++ NuGet packages with a specified version, upload the packages as an artifact, and publish them to a NuGet repository if a source URL is provided.
